exercises.title: Create Variables
exercises.description: Create three variables: age=25, name='Alice', height=5.6
exercises.explanation: Variables store different data types: int, str, and float.

exercises.title: Arithmetic Operations
exercises.explanation: Use parentheses to control the order of operations.

exercises.title: Data Type Conversion
exercises.description: Convert '42' (string) to integer and '3.14' to float
exercises.explanation: Use int() and float() functions to convert string types.

exercises.title: Type Checking
exercises.description: Check the type of variables: 5, 'hello', 3.14, True
exercises.explanation: Use type() to check what type a value is.
